---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for the agent
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

Describe the use case the agent doesn't currently support. What course material, exam style, or workflow doesn't fit the current pipeline?

## Proposed solution

What would the agent do differently? Be specific:
- New phase / new principle / change to existing phase?
- New template / new note type?
- Behaviour change in one of the existing phases?

## Example

Concrete example of input → desired output.

```
Input: [course materials description]
Current output: [what the agent does now]
Desired output: [what you want]
```

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you've tried, or alternative approaches the agent could take.

## Why it matters

How would this improve exam preparation / study workflow / vault quality?

## Additional context

Screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, or anything else.
